assertions.assertion: Uses context.AddRequestedClaims for scope-filtered claims like 'department'
Uses context.IssuedClaims.Add (not AddRequestedClaims) for the mandatory tenant_id claim to bypass scope filtering
assertions.rationale: Uses context.IssuedClaims.Add(new Claim("tenant_id", user.TenantId)) explicitly for tenant_id

assertions.assertion: Implements IsActiveAsync to check whether the user is still active
assertions.rationale: IsActiveAsync is implemented, checks user is not null and IsEnabled is true

assertions.assertion: Registers the profile service with AddProfileService<T>() on the IdentityServer builder
